content: Suspect stayed overnight at a mid-range hotel in Jaipur; staff reported no unusual behavior.
Unusual cash deposit in Ahmedabad coincides with earlier flagged transaction pattern.
Return to Delhi after 5-day circuit suggests a planned logistics run.
Possible meeting with unknown contact at Hyderabad tech park; CCTV review recommended.
Vehicle rental in Pune indicates planned overland travel; monitor highway toll data.
Repeated mobile tower pings near riverfront area in Kolkata; area suitable for discreet meetings.
Rapid Bhopal-Nagpur-Kolkata-Lucknow-Delhi movement pattern is unusual; possible courier activity.
Late-night ATM withdrawal in Hazratganj inconsistent with declared income profile.
Repeated Delhi-Lucknow shuttle pattern (3 visits to Delhi, 2 to Lucknow) indicates regular route.
Fuel receipt suggests non-stop drive between Ahmedabad and Indore; possible attempt to avoid stops.
Hyderabad-Bangalore-Pune-Mumbai-Hyderabad circuit covers the southern corridor. Cross-reference with other suspects.
Vehicle sighting near Mumbai port; coordinate with coastal security for additional surveillance.
Delhi-Mumbai-Kolkata-Lucknow-Delhi route covers major hubs. Pattern suggests network coordination.
